title: Auto Armor Stand Arms
description: Armor Stand will have their arms enabled by default in your world.
body:
# Auto Armor Stand Arms
Armor Stand will have their arms enabled by default in your world/server.

### Optional Customisations
- run `function as_health:default_armor_stand_health {value:<hp as an integer>}` to change the default health of existing and future armor stands.
  - <hp as an integer> is a whole number (vanilla is 20)
  - admin command only
- `/trigger armor_stand_arms_on_closest` removes the arms of closest armor stand within 5 blocks.
---
